name: MicroGen FX 32ch (2 layer) BETA
comment:
MicroGen FX 32ch (2 Layer) BETA
- Development real-time FX generator for microcontrollers
- A "digital" fixture (1D virtual canvas) scaled to the number of pixels of connected fixtures
- Number of pixels is set on the device.

PixelLED is the integrated and open pixel platform platform for real-time universal LED drivers
- Integrates with AI-enabled generative media and real-time synchronisation of WYSIWYH and 3D
- Fully plug-and-play hardware with data/power units for LED drivers
- Focus on the visual impact instead of complexity

CTJ LED provides tools for creators and techies to focus on visual impact
- Aims: Tech control, freedom and ownership, open source, honesty, opportunities

Say hello! :) info@ctj-led.com

MicroGen FX 32ch BETA platform. Version: "V0.5". Synchronised to document ID: 122/2
CONTROL THE JOURNEY
Copyright © 2022 CTJ LED http://ctj-led.com
